violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Establishment not using the proper method of sanitizing when using the three comp sink.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Food prep area needs to be cleaned more frequent.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. pizza prep area needs cleaning
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
